lifecycle_current: Discontinued (superseded by IBM DB2 Information Integrator / InfoSphere Federation Server)
notes: DataJoiner provided federated heterogeneous query across DB2, Oracle, Informix, Sybase, IMS, VSAM. Superseded by IBM DB2 Information Integrator (~2002) then IBM InfoSphere Federation Server.

lifecycle_current: Evolved (renamed IBM Replication / DB2 DataPropagator integrated into DB2 replication services; CDC pattern lives on)
notes: Log-based CDC replication tool. Absorbed into IBM DB2 replication capabilities; Change Data Capture pattern now dominant via Debezium, AWS DMS, etc.

lifecycle_current: Discontinued (superseded by IBM WebSphere Application Server; JSP/servlet model)
notes: Net.data allowed HTML/SQL macros for dynamic web-to-database interaction. Superseded by WebSphere and JSP/servlet model circa 2000-2002.
Also featured in Information Integration family for data movement. Renamed WebSphere MQ 2002; IBM MQ 2014. Active through 2026.
DataJoiner and DataPropagator tightly integrated with DB2. DB2 rebranded Db2 in 2017; active.
Provided bulk refresh of IMS, VSAM, and flat files into DataPropagator staging. Absorbed into broader replication tooling.

Striim, Fivetran all use log-based CDC), 1997-ibm-information-integration-family--29351c, DataPropagator's log-based capture was prescient. Log-based CDC is now the dominant enterprise data replication pattern.

1997-ibm-information-integration-family--29351c, Study's focus on data marts as pragmatic alternative to full enterprise data dictionary anticipates the modern preference for domain-specific data stores.
